news.title: 奥斯卡爆冷！伊朗战火蔓延
奥斯卡2026：完整获奖名单揭晓
news.content: 第98届奥斯卡颁奖典礼落幕，《一场接一场的战斗》获最佳影片等六项大奖，杰西·巴克利和迈克尔·B·乔丹分获最佳女主角和男主角。
news.content0: Hollywood's best and brightest have been honoured with the most coveted awards in the movie industry, the Oscars.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 伊朗民众被告知的战争信息
news.title0: What Iranians are being told about the war
news.content: 伊朗国家媒体在报道与美以的战争时，混合事实与虚假信息，夸大敌方伤亡，并使用AI生成内容进行宣传。
news.content0: The first reports appeared on foreign screens, beyond the reach of most Iranians. On 28 February Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said there were "signs that the tyrant is no more," suggesting Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei had been killed in a joint US-Israeli strike. Iranians watching state television, however, encountered silence.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 少女被误送英格兰堕胎后受创伤
news.title0: Schoolgirl 'traumatised' after being wrongly sent to England for abortion
news.content: 北爱尔兰一名18岁少女因预约系统混乱，被错误送往伦敦进行本可在本地完成的堕胎手术，过程痛苦且远离家人。
news.content0: A schoolgirl who was wrongly sent from Northern Ireland to England for a termination was traumatised by the ordeal, her mother has said.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 伊朗加强管控以防国内抗议
news.title0: Iran taking steps to prevent anti-establishment protests, Tehran residents tell BBC
news.content: 伊朗在首都增设检查站、限制网络并群发警告短信，以防范因战争可能引发的反政府抗议活动。
news.content0: Iran is taking steps to prevent anti-establishment protests, with checkpoints appearing across the streets of the capital, internet access restricted, and mass text warnings sent to residents.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美国团体推动英国新一代反堕胎运动
news.title0: How US groups are driving a new generation of anti-abortion activism in the UK
news.content: 美国反堕胎团体及资金正影响英国年轻一代，推动更激进的抗议活动，并挑战诊所外的“缓冲区”法律。
news.content0: For 21-year-old John Alexander, being against abortion came before finding faith.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 加拿大人不再赴美度假
news.title0: The vacations Canadians are no longer taking in the United States
news.content: 受特朗普政府关税、政治言论及国内冲突影响，部分加拿大游客改变计划，选择放弃美国转而前往其他国家度假。
news.content0: Bruce Newman wanted to surprise his wife with a trip for her 75th birthday, and the New Brunswick, Canada, retiree thought he had it all planned, recalling their visit to New York a decade ago when she turned 65, and they celebrated with a Broadway show.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 美国东部遭遇强风暴袭击
news.title0: Sprawling storm sparks severe thunderstorms, tornado warnings, blizzards and feet of snow
news.content: 一场大型风暴席卷美国东部，带来严重雷暴、龙卷风威胁，北部地区则出现暴风雪和大量降雪。
news.content0: A multiday storm ripping across the eastern US is bringing a significant severe weather threat that stretches from the Gulf Coast to the Northeast. On the north side, blizzard conditions threaten parts of the Midwest and Great Lakes.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 美国队击败多米尼加晋级世界棒球经典赛决赛
news.title0: USA beats Dominican Republic 2-1 to reach third straight WBC title game
news.content: 美国队在世界棒球经典赛半决赛中以2-1险胜多米尼加共和国队，连续第三届闯入决赛，将争夺队史第二冠。
news.content0: Gunnar Henderson and Roman Anthony homered and the United States limited the Dominican Republic’s electric offense to win a thrilling semifinal 2-1 on Sunday and move one win from capturing its second World Baseball Classic championship.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 《神秘博士》失落剧集重见天日
news.title0: ‘Doctor Who’ Fans Have Fresh Chance to Time Travel With Found Episodes
news.content: 英国经典科幻剧《神秘博士》两部上世纪60年代遗失的剧集被重新发现，粉丝将有机会观看这些珍贵影像。
news.content0: Fans of “Doctor Who,” the long-running sci-fi show about a time-traveling, space-venturing alien, will soon get to step into a time machine themselves to watch two recently rediscovered episodes from the 1960s.
news.author: NYTimes
